title: zanthoxylum duckei
intro: Zanthoxylum duckei is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the Rutaceae or citrus family. It is native to Brazil and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum duckei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum duckei include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from colds and flu to skin conditions and digestive problems.
